name: search-plus-plus-v1-mcp
description: High-performance C++ MCP server with multi-engine web search (Baidu, Bing, Bilibili)

tools.name: search_baidu
tools.description: Search on Baidu and return results with title, URL, and snippet

tools.name: search_bing
tools.description: Search on Bing and return results with title, URL, and snippet

tools.name: search_bilibili
tools.description: Search on Bilibili for videos and return results with title, URL, view count, and uploader

tools.name: search_multi
tools.description: Search across multiple engines (baidu, bing, bilibili) in parallel

tools.name: calculator
tools.description: Perform basic arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide)

tools.name: get_time
tools.description: Get the current date and time with milliseconds

prompts.name: explain
prompts.description: Ask for an explanation of a topic at a given level

install.instructions: Build from source using CMake. Requires C++17 compiler, libcurl, and nlohmann_json.
